operating_leases.current_location: The non-current operating lease liability of 1437M is shown as a separate line 'Operating lease liabilities' on the balance sheet. The current portion is not shown as a separate line on the balance sheet face. The XBRL tag OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList is not available in the provided XBRL facts. The current portion is likely embedded within 'Accrued liabilities' of 2164M but cannot be separately identified from the provided data. Flag: current operating lease liability not separately disclosed on balance sheet face.

depreciation_and_amortization.note: Primary D&A line on CF is 787M (us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization for YTD 2023). Debt cost amortization of 4M is a separate CF line. Total for cash flow reconciliation purposes: D&A addback is 787M; debt amortization 4M is separate. Segment reconciliation in Note 12 confirms 787M for six months 2023.

accounts_payable.note: Balance sheet shows separate 'Accounts payable - Trade' of 3024M tagged as us-gaap:AccountsPayableTradeCurrent. This is pure trade AP. Related party payables of 493M are shown separately. Note 6 discloses 57M of supply chain finance obligations included within AP Trade as of June 30 2023.

accounts_receivable.note: Balance sheet shows 'Accounts receivable - Trade, net' of 3638M tagged as us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent, net of allowance for credit losses of 6M per Note 4. Related party receivables of 173M are separately shown. This is pure trade AR.

capex.note: CF statement shows 'Expenditures for property, plant and equipment' of 653M (us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment) for six months 2023. No separate intangibles capex line. No supplemental disclosure of capital expenditures incurred but not yet paid found in the provided XBRL data.

acquisitions.note: No acquisition-related cash flow line items appear in the six months ended June 30 2023 investing activities section. Note 12 mentions acquisition of remaining 50% of Quality Circular Polymers in April 2023; however no separate cash payment for acquisition appears as a tagged XBRL fact in the investing section. The acquisition may be captured within 'Other, net' investing of -89M or may have been non-cash. Cannot confirm cash paid for acquisitions from available data.

short_term_debt.note: Short-term debt balance per BS is 130M (us-gaap:ShortTermBorrowings). Per Note 6, this consists entirely of precious metal financings of 130M. No commercial paper outstanding, no US Receivables Facility borrowings.

sbc.note: Share-based compensation addback on CF statement is 48M (us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation) for six months ended June 30 2023. No breakout by function found in the provided XBRL facts.

interest_expense.source: IS shows Interest expense of 231M and Interest income of 51M separately for six months 2023. No note disclosure separating gross interest expense further. The 231M is the gross interest expense figure as presented on the income statement.

flags: Goodwill impairment of 252M in H1 2023 with no tax benefit increases effective rate by 2.8%; audit settlement increases rate by 2.4%; effective rate of 22.9% for H1 2023 per Note 8

All components confirmed by XBRL tags us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves, us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves, us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsAndSuppliesNetOfReserves.
